zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwladys ferch Llywelyn於1205年出生在威爾士時，她的父親Llywelyn ab Iorwerth31歲，母親Joan Lady of Wales17歲。她於1225年與Ralph Mortimer在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1251年10月24日在英國波克夏溫莎女爵享年46歲，埋葬在英國波克夏溫莎女爵。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwladys ferch Llywelyn于1205年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲Llywelyn ab Iorwerth31岁，母亲Joan Lady of Wales17岁。她于1225年与Ralph Mortimer在威尔士结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1251年10月24日在英国波克夏溫莎女爵享年46岁，埋葬在英国波克夏溫莎女爵。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Gwladys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwladys ferch Llywelyn was born in 1205, in Wales, her father, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, was 31 and her mother, Joan Lady of Wales, was 17. She married Ralph Mortimer in 1225, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 24 October 1251, in Windsor, Berkshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Windsor, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwladys ferch Llywelyn est née en 1205, à Galles, son père, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Lady of Wales, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Mortimer en 1225, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 octobre 1251, à Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwladys ferch Llywelyn 1205 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llywelyn ab Iorwerth 31 und ihre Mutter Joan Lady of Wales 17. Sie hat 1225 in Wales Ralph Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Oktober 1251 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Windsor, Berkshire, England und wurde in Windsor, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Llywelyn è nata il nel 1205 nel Galles, sua padre, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Joan Lady of Wales, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Mortimer nel 1225, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1251, nel Windsor, Berkshire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Windsor, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Llywelynが1205年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Llywelyn ab Iorwerthは31歳，母Joan Lady of Walesは17歳であった。1225年にウェールズでRalph Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1251年10月24日にイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソルで46歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソルにて埋葬された。

ko.St George's Chapel Windsor Castle - Wind: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 윈드소르 스트 조그'스 차플
ko.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Llywelyn(이)가 1205년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llywelyn ab Iorwerth(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Lady of Wales(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1225년 웨일스에서 Ralph Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1251년 10월 24일 영국 버크실르 윈드소르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 윈드소르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Llywelyn nasceu em 1205, em Gales, seu pai, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Lady of Wales, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Mortimer em 1225, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1251, em Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwladys ferch Llywelyn родилась в 1205 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени Llywelyn ab Iorwerth было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Lady of Wales, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Mortimer в 1225 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 24 октября 1251 г. в местности виндзор, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности виндзор, биркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Ralph Mortimer en 1225, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1251, en Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
